channel.title: Teanote Blog
channel.description: Guides and updates for Teanote — a mindful tea journal and gongfu timer.

item.title: How to Write Tea Tasting Notes (Simple Template)
item.description: A practical 5-line template for notes you’ll actually write.

item.title: Gongfu Timer Times by Tea Type (Starting Points)
item.description: Simple timing starting points for oolong, puer, black, white, and green teas.

item.title: How to Track Your Tea Inventory (Without Spreadsheets)
item.description: The minimum viable tea profile + how to connect inventory to sessions.

item.title: New feature: upload photos directly to tea profiles and brew sessions
item.description: Direct photo uploads for tea profiles and brew sessions.

item.title: Why Keeping a Tea Journal Changes How You Taste Tea
item.description: How a tea journal builds tasting memory and awareness.

item.title: Gongfu Timer update: visual infusion animation
item.description: A visual infusion animation to make session timing clearer.
